payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet/closet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular center panel; the upper portion is partially cut off by an overhead lamp and the crop is edge-cropped, slightly low-resolution/blurred, with no visible hardware and appears tall and close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).
attributes: indoor lighting / lamp glare at top
